catalogData.name: Death
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Execute
powers.raw: Execute (Major Action): Kill target if Physical damage ≥ Health
powers.text: Kill target if Physical damage ≥ Health

powers.name: False Death
powers.raw: False Death (Complex Action, Sustained): Make (Force) targets appear dead. Resist: WIL+INT
powers.text: Make (Force) targets appear dead. Resist: WIL+INT

powers.name: Hasten Death
powers.raw: Hasten Death (Minor Action, Sustained 1 minute): If target takes any damage, it takes +1 damage. Resist: WIL+BOD
powers.text: If target takes any damage, it takes +1 damage. Resist: WIL+BOD

powers.name: Reap Wounds
powers.raw: Reap Wounds (Major Action): Target takes Physical damage equal to current Physical damage (max Force x2). Resist: BOD
powers.text: Target takes Physical damage equal to current Physical damage (max Force x2). Resist: BOD

powers.name: Terrifying Appearance
powers.raw: Terrifying Appearance (Complex Action, Sustained): Materialize to physical plane and cast Terrify at Force
powers.text: Materialize to physical plane and cast Terrify at Force

greatFormPowers.name: Baleful
greatFormPowers.raw: Baleful (Trait): Gain +6 DV to attacks instead of +2
greatFormPowers.text: Gain +6 DV to attacks instead of +2
